title: Crypto Trading Bot
description: Production framework with Binance real-time ingestion, 10+ indicators, 7 pluggable strategy modules, and signal engine with TP/SL risk controls. Containerized with Docker and Kubernetes.

title: Planitt Market Analyzer
description: AI-driven financial intelligence platform with conversational interface powered by local LLaMA 3. Features live TradingView charts, AI news sentiment, and stock screeners.

title: Indian Trader v4.0
description: NSE/BSE algorithmic suite featuring Smart Money Concepts (FVGs, order blocks), multi-timeframe signals, and Transformer ML candle prediction models.

title: P-L-Viewer
description: Lightweight CSV-to-Firestore sync pipeline with SHA-256 row hashing, batched upserts, and an Expo React Native mobile viewer for portfolio inspection.

title: Bhav App
description: Cross-platform fintech app with in-app purchases, Razorpay integration, real-time socket updates, and EAS build pipelines.

title: QRDine
description: QR-based cafe ordering platform with 5 role surfaces, real-time order broadcasting via Socket.IO, CSV bulk imports, and Cloudinary media uploads.

title: Sakura Dream (Visual Novel)
description: Browser-based anime visual novel with 9 branching endings, typewriter text effects, dynamic character routes, and a JSON-configurable story system.

title: CodeFlex (IEEE SBJITMR)
description: Event management platform for the IEEE SBJITMR chapter with authentication, dynamic content loading, and event registration flows.
